svg.title: Workflow Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing Platform User → Frontend/Workflow Builder → PostgreSQL → Backend API → Orchestrator → Generated Agents → Final Output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Platform User role')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Frontend Workflow Builder')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PostgreSQL layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Backend API')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Orchestrator')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Agent n')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Final Output')
